steps.title: Check the common factor
steps.content:
Each term in $3x^2+45x+18$ is divisible by $3$:
$$
3x^2+45x+18=3(x^2+15x+6)
$$

steps.title: Eliminate larger variable factors
steps.content: The constant term $18$ is not divisible by factors that include $x$, so $6x$, $45x$, and $3x^2$ cannot be factors of the entire expression. The answer is A.
